mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (role_id, username, name, password) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{username}, #{name}, #{password})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update:
UPDATE member
name = #{request.name}, gender = #{request.gender}, age = #{request.age}, height = #{request.height}, weight = #{request.weight}, body_fat_percentage = #{request.bodyFatPercentage}, target_weight = #{request.targetWeight}, fitness_goal = #{request.fitnessGoal}, phone_number = #{request.phoneNumber}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE member SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE member SET password = #{newEncodedPassword}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE member SET is_deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = #{username}
